For service to St Lawrence Av, Morrison Av-Soundview, Elder Av and Whitlock Av, take the [6] to Hunts Point Av and transfer to a Pelham Bay Park-bound [6].

Things to know:
SIM4X and SIM8X are special express trips of the SIM4 and SIM8 routes.
